headline: SpaceX IPO Draws $10B in Orders Overnight

article.summary: SpaceX’s initial public offering is well oversubscribed with multiple institutional investors placing orders for about $10 billion or more of shares, according to people familiar with the matter, as demand builds for a potentially record-setting debut.

headline: Oil Flat at $70 Amid Israel-Iran Truce

article.title: Oil Steady as Israel and Iran Halt Hostilities That Risked Talks
article.summary: Oil steadied after Israel and Iran agreed to end attacks against each other following an escalation of violence that threatened to derail efforts to end the war in the Middle East.
